title: tulipa sylvestris subsp. celsiana
intro: Tulipa sylvestris subsp. celsiana, also known as Alpine Tulip or Wild Tulip, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Tulipa and the family Liliaceae. The medicinal properties of Tulipa sylvestris subsp. celsiana include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Tulipa sylvestris subsp. celsiana can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and improve immune function.
